elements.name: Description
texts: "From the watchers below a great cry still reaches to the Lady of Heaven, to Mary, the joy of the Gael, whose feet rest on Iona..."

elements.name: Source
texts: Leslie, Shane, The Story of St. Patrick’s Purgatory,

elements.name: Publisher
texts: B. Herder book co., St. Louis, Mo. and London

elements.name: Contributor
texts: Digitised by Google, sponsored by Harvard University

elements.name: Text
texts: "From the watchers below a great cry still reaches to the Lady of Heaven, to Mary, the joy of the Gael, whose feet rest on Iona; Mary, clothed with the bright treasure of the northern seas, whose loveliness yet lights the cottage homes of the west; Mary, whose girdle is the love of Ireland, whose hair is bound with the stars that shine upon the holy lakes of Ireland."
